description_long: This is a vibrant red disposable milkshake cup with a white plastic flat lid and a red-and-white striped bendy straw inserted through the center. The cup features a bold white atomic symbol graphic on the front, flanked by two horizontal white stripes near the top and bottom. The surface of the cup is smooth and glossy, with a small black-and-white QR code and recycling symbol visible on the back. The lid fits snugly over the rim, and the straw is flexible, allowing for easy sipping. The cup appears to be made of lightweight coated paper or plastic, typical for takeout beverages in urban environments.
description: A red disposable milkshake cup with a white flat lid, striped bendy straw, and atomic symbol graphic. The cup is glossy, with a QR code and recycling symbol on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the atomic symbol graphic, white lid, and striped straw.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the QR code and recycling symbol, with the straw seen from above.
description_view_2: Side-rear view highlighting the recycling symbol and the curvature of the straw.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with partial atomic symbol visible and the straw viewed end-on.
